---
title: "Kernels"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Kernel Selection Hub

Choose a bulk kernel based on support, shape, and tail behavior. Then move into the catalog pages.

[Kernel catalog index](kernels/kernels-index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Summary backend table](kernels/summary-distribution-backend-reference.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## How to choose

1. Confirm support: real-line vs positive-support.
2. Match bulk behavior: symmetry, skew, heavy tails, multimodality tolerance.
3. Decide backend workflow with [Start backends and workflow](start/backends-and-workflow.qmd).
4. Validate with examples and diagnostics.

## Key kernel pages

- [Normal](kernels/kernel-normal.qmd)
- [Laplace](kernels/kernel-laplace.qmd)
- [Cauchy](kernels/kernel-cauchy.qmd)
- [Lognormal](kernels/kernel-lognormal.qmd)
- [Gamma](kernels/kernel-gamma.qmd)
- [Amoroso](kernels/kernel-amoroso.qmd)
- [Inverse Gaussian (base)](kernels/kernel-inverse-gaussian-base.qmd)
- [Inverse Gaussian (mixture)](kernels/kernel-inverse-gaussian-mixture.qmd)

## Supporting pages

- [Mathematical definitions and conventions](kernels/mathematical-definitions-and-conventions.qmd)
- [Introduction with GPD kernel](kernels/introduction-with-gpd-kernel.qmd)
- [Summary distribution-backend reference](kernels/summary-distribution-backend-reference.qmd)

## API and registries

- [Kernel support table](pkgdown/reference/kernel_support_table.html)
- [Kernel registry](pkgdown/reference/get_kernel_registry.html)
- [Tail registry](pkgdown/reference/get_tail_registry.html)

:::
:::

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Introduction With Gpd Kernel](kernels/introduction-with-gpd-kernel.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
